tags.description: The Otish Mountains form a chain running through the centre of the Quebec-Labrador peninsula. The summits are exposed, revealing a large amount of erratic rock. The source for the main rivers of northern Quebec resides in these mountains.
tags.name: Monts Otish
Mont Yapeitso
tags.source:prominence: 1128-460 (Col at the NE of Lac Caneé)
